title: manulea arabidea
intro: Manulea arabidea, also known as the Arabian manulea or Cape manulea, is a flowering plant species native to the southern parts of Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. Manulea arabidea is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
